🤯 We talk about serial winners, but did Samuel Eto'o get enough credit for his BACK-TO-BACK trebles with Barcelona (09') and Inter Milan (10')?! That's legendary status right there. A true force of nature leading the line for two different giants. #AfricanLegends #FootballHistory

Did you REALLY appreciate the absolute uniqueness of George Weah? This man didn't just win the 1995 Ballon d'Or; he became the ONLY African player to do it. His solo goals for Milan, the sheer POWER, the skill... he was unstoppable before "solo goal" was even a trend. A true legend who defied expectations! #Weah #BallonDor #ACMilan #AfricanLegends

Do you know the ONLY African player to win the Ballon d'Or while playing in Europe?

It was GEORGE WEAH in 1995! 🇱🇷 His solo goal for AC Milan against Verona is still a highlight reel staple. A true pioneer, tearing up Serie A and proving anything is possible. Legendary status deserved. #AfricanFootball #BallondOr
